name: Isicelo se-Occlusive Chest Seal
description: Ukuvala inxeba lesifuba elimunyayo (i-pneumothorax evulekile) ngesivalo sesifuba esivulekile ukuvimbela ukungena komoya ngenkathi kuvumela ukuphuma kwengcindezi.
steps: Veza isilonda -- sika noma susa izingubo.
Sula isikhumba esizungeze isilonda njengokoma ngangokunokwenzeka (igazi, umjuluko uvimbela ukunamathela).
Beka uphawu phezu kwesilonda, ugxile emgodini. Cindezela ngokuqinile, uqinisekise ukuthi yonke imiphetho iyanamathela.
Hlola ukuma kwevalvu -- imbobo kufanele ibheke ngaphandle (ikude nesikhumba) futhi ihlale ingavimbekile.
Phinda uhlole imisindo yokuphefumula. Uma ukonakala kuqhubeka ngemva kokuvalwa, cabanga nge-tension pneumothorax -- yenza i-NCD.
Uma isivalo esikhipha umoya singatholakali, isigxivizo esingangenisi singasetshenziswa kodwa KUMELE kuqashelwe ukuthuthukiswa kwe-tension pneumothorax.
warnings: Ama-non-vented seals angaguqula i-pneumothorax elula ibe i-tension pneumothorax -- sebenzisa ama-vent seal kuphela ensimini.
Ukuthepha ezinhlangothini ezintathu (uphawu oluthuthukisiwe) akusanconyiwe yi-CoTCCC -- sebenzisa uphawu lwesifuba olungena ngaphandle kwezentengiso.
Njalo faka isivalo ku-ENTRANCE kanye namanxeba OPHUMA.
